query:
SELECT 
  lm.id,
  lm.key,
  lm.title,
  lm.subtitle,
  lm.capability,
  lm.modality,
  lm.difficulty,
  lm.level_label,
  lm.duration_mins,
  lm.estimated_reading_mins,
  lm.status,
  lm.required_capability_score,
  lm.required_level,
  GROUP_CONCAT(CONCAT(lmt.tag_type, ':', lmt.tag_value) SEPARATOR ' | ') AS tags
FROM learning_modules lm
LEFT JOIN learning_module_tags lmt ON lmt.module_id = lm.id
GROUP BY lm.id
ORDER BY lm.capability, lm.difficulty, lm.title;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4N5hTKUqkKVKapg.d5b2b277a65e --database 6QhAyfvWVgMWYWiBVkrTMQ --execute 
SELECT 
  lm.id,
  lm.key,
  lm.title,
  lm.subtitle,
  lm.capability,
  lm.modality,
  lm.difficulty,
  lm.level_label,
  lm.duration_mins,
  lm.estimated_reading_mins,
  lm.status,
  lm.required_capability_score,
  lm.required_level,
  GROUP_CONCAT(CONCAT(lmt.tag_type, ':', lmt.tag_value) SEPARATOR ' | ') AS tags
FROM learning_modules lm
LEFT JOIN learning_module_tags lmt ON lmt.module_id = lm.id
GROUP BY lm.id
ORDER BY lm.capability, lm.difficulty, lm.title;
